targets.query: from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_handover") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ho_trigger_count") |> last()
from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_handover") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ho_exec_count") |> last()
from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_handover") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ho_fail_count") |> last()

panels.title: TA total per UE — handover boundaries are jumps

targets.query: from(bucket: "ntn") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ntn_timing_advance") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ta_total_us")
